name: social-media-analyzer
description: Analyzes social media campaign performance across platforms with engagement metrics, ROI calculations, and audience insights for data-driven marketing decisions
capabilities: Calculate engagement rate from likes, comments, shares, saves, and reach data
Compute click-through rate, cost per engagement, and return on ad spend
Compare performance against industry benchmarks for Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and TikTok
Identify top performing posts and content types by engagement metrics
Generate actionable recommendations for campaign optimization
Analyze audience insights including demographics and peak engagement times
author: alirezarezvani
securitySummary: All 26 static findings are false positives. Scanner misidentified docstrings as crypto code, markdown backticks as shell execution, and marketing terminology as system reconnaissance. Code contains only benign Python arithmetic for engagement and ROI calculations.
valueStatement: Marketing teams need to quantify campaign effectiveness across multiple platforms. This skill calculates engagement rates, ROI, and cost efficiency metrics to deliver data-backed optimization recommendations.
limitations: Cannot access social media APIs directly; requires manual data export
Industry benchmarks are general guidelines that vary by niche and audience
Historical performance does not guarantee future results

useCases.title: Client Performance Reports
useCases.description: Generate comprehensive performance reports for client campaigns with ROI breakdown and benchmarking insights.

useCases.title: Campaign ROI Tracking
useCases.description: Calculate return on ad spend and identify which content drives the most engagement.

useCases.title: Content Performance Analysis
useCases.description: Compare engagement across platforms and identify high-performing content patterns.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Campaign Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this Instagram campaign data and tell me which posts performed best based on engagement rate.

promptTemplates.title: ROI Calculation
promptTemplates.prompt: Calculate the ROI on this Facebook ad campaign with $1,200 spend and these click metrics.

promptTemplates.title: Cross-Platform Comparison
promptTemplates.prompt: Compare our engagement rates across Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn for the last month.

promptTemplates.title: Full Performance Report
promptTemplates.prompt: Run a complete analysis on this campaign data including benchmarks, top posts, and optimization recommendations.

bestPractices: Provide complete metrics including likes, comments, shares, saves, reach, impressions, and clicks for accurate analysis
Compare metrics within the same time periods for fair platform comparisons
Consider platform-specific benchmarks when evaluating performance (Instagram differs from LinkedIn)
antiPatterns: Analyzing campaigns without specifying the platform (each has different benchmarks)
Comparing organic and paid metrics together without separation
Drawing conclusions from fewer than 10 posts (insufficient data for reliable insights)

faq.question: What data do I need to provide?
faq.answer: Provide platform name, likes, comments, shares, saves, reach, impressions, clicks, and ad spend amount.

faq.question: Which platforms are supported?
faq.answer: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and TikTok with platform-specific benchmarks.

faq.question: How is engagement rate calculated?
faq.answer: Engagement rate equals total engagements divided by reach, multiplied by 100.

faq.question: Can I analyze historical data?
faq.answer: Yes, provide campaign data with dates and the skill will analyze past performance trends.

faq.question: Does this connect to social APIs?
faq.answer: No, this skill analyzes data you provide. Connect to platform APIs separately for data export.

faq.question: How accurate are the benchmarks?
faq.answer: Benchmarks are general industry averages. Your niche and audience may have different baseline expectations.
